en_title: New La La Land Poster Finally Fixes Issue That Bothered Ryan Gosling for Years
cn_title: 高斯林吐槽十年的《爱乐之城》海报终于改了
subtitle: 那只手终于摆对了

paragraphs.en: An updated version of the La La Land movie poster has finally fixed an issue that’s haunted Ryan Gosling for nearly a decade.
paragraphs.cn: 新版《爱乐之城》电影海报终于修正了一个困扰瑞安·高斯林近十年的问题。

paragraphs.en: La La Land is turning ten years old, and to celebrate, Lionsgate has created a new version of the film’s iconic movie poster that shows Gosling and co-star Emma Stone dancing while the lights of Los Angeles watch in the background.
paragraphs.cn: 《爱乐之城》即将迎来十周年，狮门影业为此制作了新版经典海报：高斯林与联合主演艾玛·斯通翩翩起舞，洛杉矶灯火在背景中映照。

paragraphs.en: This update comes as a welcome reprieve for Gosling, who has long complained of an issue in the original poster: his left hand. Or, as he calls it, “La La Hand.”
paragraphs.cn: 这次更新让高斯林如释重负。他长期抱怨原版海报中的一个问题：自己的左手，也就是他口中的「爱乐之手」。

paragraphs.en: As told by the star himself in a 2024 interview with WSJ , he wasn’t aware the photo would become the flick’s official poster. "We were supposed to have our hands up, and I thought it would be cool to put my hand [more flat], even though everyone told me it wasn’t cool,” he explained. “I was sure it was cooler. Now when I look at it, and I have to see it all the time, you know, what would’ve been cooler… [the intended pose]. It just killed the energy that way.”
paragraphs.cn: 高斯林在2024年接受《华尔街日报》采访时说，自己当时不知道这张照片会成为电影正式海报。他解释道：「我们本来应该把手举起来，但我觉得把手放得更平会很酷，尽管所有人都告诉我那样不酷。我当时坚信更酷。现在每次看到它——而且我不得不一直看到——才明白什么会更酷……就是原定姿势。我的摆法把那股活力完全破坏了。」

paragraphs.en: La La Land is coming back to theaters starting Sunday, August 16 in honor of its 10th anniversary. Movie-goers can see it in Dolby Cinema at AMC Theaters and relive the musical romantic comedy-drama that won six Oscars and seven Golden Globes, following aspiring actress Mia and jazz musician Seb as they try to carve out their lives in Los Angeles. IGN gave the film a 9.5 out of 10 , with Terri Schwartz calling it a “joyous filmgoing experience” and a “musical brimming with optimism that never becomes treacly.”
paragraphs.cn: 为纪念上映10周年，《爱乐之城》将从8月16日星期日起重返影院。观众可在AMC影院的杜比影院重温这部歌舞爱情喜剧剧情片。影片讲述怀抱演员梦想的Mia与爵士乐手Seb努力在洛杉矶开创人生，曾获得6项奥斯卡奖和7项金球奖。IGN为其打出9.5/10分，Terri Schwartz称它是「令人愉悦的观影体验」，也是一部「充满乐观精神却从不甜腻的歌舞片」。

paragraphs.en: This isn’t the only big news for La La Land; it’s also getting a Broadway adaptation , which will feature music from Justin Hurwitz and lyrics by Benj Pasek and Justin Paul, all three of whom worked on the soundtrack for the film.
paragraphs.cn: 《爱乐之城》的大消息还不止于此：它也将改编为百老汇音乐剧，由Justin Hurwitz作曲，Benj Pasek与Justin Paul作词；三人都曾参与电影原声创作。

paragraphs.en: Marc Platt, producer for La la Land, said he was “thrilled” to bring the flick to Broadway, calling it the “next exciting chapter in its evolution.”
paragraphs.cn: 《爱乐之城》制片人Marc Platt表示，能把影片带到百老汇令他「激动不已」，并称这是作品演变过程中的「下一个精彩篇章」。

paragraphs.en: “We’ve assembled a world-class team to create a musical that will delight ‘La La Land’s’ millions of current fans and introduce the property to a whole new audience.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我们集结了一支世界级团队，将打造一部让《爱乐之城》数百万现有粉丝欣喜、同时把这部作品介绍给全新观众的音乐剧。」

opus_summary: 《爱乐之城》十周年新版海报修正了瑞安·高斯林一直不满意的左手姿势。影片将于8月16日重返影院，并正改编为由原电影音乐团队参与创作的百老汇音乐剧。
